hero.tagline: Designing the Future of Business from Bangkok
hero.subtitle: Accounting outsourcing, internal DX, and AI training. We support Japanese businesses in Thailand with technology and hands-on expertise.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From accounting to AI—three solutions to strengthen the management foundation of Japanese businesses in Bangkok.

service1.title: Accounting Outsourcing
service1.subtitle: 経理代行
service1.description: From monthly and annual accounting to payroll and tax filing, we handle your books in full compliance with Thai regulations. Our experienced team functions as your accounting department, freeing you to focus on growth.

service2.title: App & AI Integration
service2.subtitle: 社内情報のアプリ化 & AI化
service2.description: We consolidate scattered internal data into apps and dramatically improve efficiency with AI. Move beyond paper and Excel to enable real-time business decisions.

service3.title: Personal AI Training
service3.subtitle: 管理者向けパーソナルAIトレーニング
service3.description: Hands-on, one-on-one training for managers on using AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude in daily operations. Customized to your specific workflow for immediate impact.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Bridging technology and accounting to support Japanese businesses in Thailand.
about.address_jp: 954/1724 The Metropolis Building, 3rd Floor, Room No. M3, Moo. 9, Thepharak, Muang Samutprakarn, Samutprakarn 10270
about.address_en: 954/1724 The Metropolis Building, 3rd Floor, Room No. M3, Moo. 9, Thepharak, Muang Samutprakarn, Samutprakarn 10270
about.message: Through my experience running businesses in Bangkok, I've witnessed firsthand the accounting challenges that Japanese companies face in Thailand—language barriers, regulatory differences, and the rapid pace of digitalization. Addressing these challenges through both practical expertise and technology is MIRAI BizLab's mission. With accounting as our foundation, we leverage AI and applications to move your business forward.

blog.title: CEO Blog
blog.subtitle: Insights on management and AI adoption in Thailand.

sample_posts.title: 3 Key Points in Thai Accounting for Japanese Businesses
sample_posts.excerpt: Japanese companies operating in Thailand face unique accounting challenges due to language and regulatory differences. Here are three critical points to keep in mind.

sample_posts.title: How to Use ChatGPT in Accounting Operations
sample_posts.excerpt: AI technology is accelerating efficiency in accounting. In this article, we share practical use cases and implementation strategies.

sample_posts.title: DX Challenges Facing Japanese Companies in Bangkok
sample_posts.excerpt: The wave of digital transformation is reaching Thailand. Let's explore the on-the-ground challenges and solutions.
